title: Potion Limiter
body:
## Take full control of every potion on your server.

PotionLimiter lets you disable any potion in the game on a per-tier basis. Whether you want to ban Strength II in PvP, remove Instant Health from competitive play, or block all negative potions from being thrown at players — PotionLimiter handles it all with a single config toggle or a click in the GUI.

In-game GUI via `/potionlimiter ui` or `/pl ui` with live toggling — no restart needed.

Features:

- Individual on/off toggle for every potion in the game
- Blocks drinkable, splash, lingering, and tipped arrow variants
- `/pc reload` to apply config changes instantly

**No need to use the config.yml , do `/pl ui` or `/potionlimiter ui` and you can ban / allow potions from there , use the arrows in the ui to get to the different pages ( you can do either )**

## Installation

1. Drop latest `potionlimiter-x.x.x.jar` into your `plugins/` folder.

## Support
![Support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c681a00eaa95d93c03b28566a266f2aad3707e5f.png)

**Want to support mod and authors? Just tell everyone about this mod!**

Yeah, you got it right. Just by advertising, you will support the mod and the creators well. The more people will know about this mod, the more downloads it will have, more downloads will give good motivation to authors and increase income from the site (literally free donation). Remember, advertising must not be intrusive and annoiyng!

What you can do?

Make a video review / advertisement

Tell your friends about this plugin

Just download this plugin (if you want to play with it :D)
